data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Post-completion certificate', but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this feature. While the linked use case mentions the need for a post-completion certificate, it does not provide concrete evidence of its implementation or how it is generated, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage. The absence of specific details or endpoints related to the post-completion certificate further supports this conclusion.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or generation of a post-completion certificate.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for post-completion certificate implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API returns the expected post-completion certificate details.
